text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Listen up, Trainer! In my dream, I did it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I unveiled the long-standing mystery of
the Umamusume body!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what a sensation it was! It gave me
goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Of course, when I awoke, I had completely
forgotten its secrets.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
However! That feeling of exhilaration that ran
through my entire body was unforgettable!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I want to experience it once again. I have to
make it a reality somehow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon looks happy to have had a good
dream. I'm glad she was able to rest well.
